name: World War Toons: Tank Arena VR

reviews.review_description:
(Kids want voice chat read before buy)

Okay so you know every game haves voice chat right but this game barley does. 

When you go in multiplayer lobby you have to friend people for voice chat that is dum for the owner doing that

Cuz the owner think but what if there are gonna be predators in this game

Bro that a Roblox problem not a VR problem so if you like interact with people don’t get this game till owner change there mind

This was indeed my first purchase back in December 2023. I enjoyed it a lot but after a couple of matches, the AI wasn't a challenge anymore resulting in winning every round. 
I've tried playing against human players quite a few times but never and I mean NEVER was able to play against anyone apart from a friend of mine which I suggested this game.
Before I bought the game, the devs promised new maps in the future on Discord, as the very limited amount of maps wasn't making the purchase a no-brainer. At this day, unfortunately nothing happened and they don't even answer on Discord anymore. 
A Quest3 specific graphics update would be the cherry on the cake but that's definitely too much asked at this point and the maps addition would make me happy enough. 
The price of the game has dropped a lot within a couple of months, so I guess it's totally fine to get it for that price, especially if you have friends to play with/against or don't care much about multiplayer.
I understand that if a game isn't doing great, you don't want to spend more resources on the project anymore, but I have not been told the truth unfortunately. 
I'll gladly add the missing 2 stars if they would at least show some support effort by adding at least 2 new maps.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your review.
We are glad that you have enjoyed the game. We appreciate your feedback regarding AI difficulty, multiplayer matching, and new map additions.
The development team is currently reviewing update plans, though specific timelines have not been finalized yet.

reviews.review_description:
All positive ! Only if I could use thumb-stick to manoeuvre . As an oldie I find my   
self not adjusting quick enough.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review. We will forward your information regarding the thumb operation to the relevant department for review. We hope you will continue to show interest and play.

reviews.review_description:
The graphics looks like it's a game from the 90's for sure. lol
However, I must admit the gameplay itself, especially the 'unique loading mechanics' part is kinda cool. Not bad to give it a shot.
For those who are not sure whether to try out or not-
It's an arcade game made into a VR game. I give it a 5 star because I saw many videos and it offered exactly what I wanted.

developer_response.body:
Hello SURRENDER_999,
Thank you for your generous review. We do admit that the graphics are a bit cartoonish and it's something we've been hearing a lot lately. We will try our best to improve in this area though and try to satisfy our Commanders. 
Also, I'm happy to hear that our game was exactly what you were looking for. We have many plans and updates, so if you haven't already, come and join our Discord community: https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: The graphics are fantastic and the immersive gameplay is on another level. I've been recommending this game to all my friends!

developer_response.body: Thank you, GGIRUUU, for leaving us a 5-star review and recommending our games to your friends. Our game is definitely more fun when played with friends, and especially when you play against one another. I recommend joining our Discord community and finding other commanders to play with, too. https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: I want to give it a 4 only because of bhaptics support but with out voice chat i just feel im playing with bots but gameplay is super solid

developer_response.body:
Hello! You can set up your voice chat options in-game when you're inside your tank - press the menu button on the left controller to access it! Thanks! 
In addition, you can find other players on our Discord channel. If you have any more suggestions, join our Discord channel at https://discord.gg/tankarenavr.

reviews.review_description: No Teamspeak, No custom Matchmaking, Reloadmechanics only work randomly...

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for playing WWT:TA VR.
We do know we need more features to make our game better, and actually we're working on some of those you mentioned.
Thank you again for your review and hope to see you in the battlefield!
For more information, please join our Discord at : 
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description:
It was like playing a game in a real tank. 
I could feel the advantages of VR well. 
It would be better if there was a system could multiplay with friends.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review of our game! We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the immersive gameplay and that you were able to feel the benefits of using VR. Your suggestion about adding a multiplayer feature is in the works and will be announced in the near future update. We appreciate your feedback and we hope you continue to have a great time playing. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and for your support of our game. If you’d like to hear more about future updates or would like to interact with other Commanders, come and join our Discord channel in the provided link:  
Discord:  https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description:
It would be a fun game for someone who likes FPS. That's who I am.

Gameplay: Hard but fun
Graphics: It's good enough, but I think it'd be better if a cute character or realistic  was added
Replayability: Finding myself returning daily
Difficulty: Controls are hard to get used to
Play pace: Very fast paced. Constantly in motion and you have to be aware of your surroundings

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your detailed review, everybodyhandsup. We're also happy to hear that you are enjoying the game play and finding yourself returning daily. Sounds like you'll be a Master Commander very soon. We plan on upgrading the graphics too so keep an eye out on our future updates. If you would like to be the first to hear about our upcoming updates, join our Discord community: https://discord.gg/tankarenavr
See you on the battlefield!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve earned no coins which I can only assume comes from playing Multiplayer, although said that I had one Multiplayer win and NOTHING!! Although, I just spent 10 mins waiting for a Multiplayer game like a complete chump! At least tell us how many players are currently queued!! 

If it zero after 5mins I’ll know to quit. For all I know, I could have been seconds from battle when I thought, “nah, forget this!!…” And quit. 

C’mon… If you’re going to tout this as a multiplayer game, at least build it user friendly for that! Or else, let us casual players play against AI and still progress!! Grrr…

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing WWT: TAVR. I'm sorry to hear that you have not earned any coins. Coins are earned through level ups and can be found in the “loot box” from the menu.  Usually after unlocking all the tanks and some deco items, you’ll be able to earn coins at every level. 
As for the multiplayer queue, we are working on better matchmaking and UX/UI that will be updated soon. We'll notify you ASAP of the progress! We value your feedback and if you would like to give us your opinion in real time, please join our Official Discord channel in the provided link: Thank you once again for your feedback. 
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: The game is cool. But we need to develop more weapons, better graphics, even more weapons and abilities

developer_response.body:
Hey Winjester, 
Thank you for your positive review and feedback.
We will let the developers know about what our Commanders want so that there will be more improvements to the game. 

If you ever want to play with other player too, join our Discord community and tag the admins there, they'll jump into the game and play together. 

Here is our Discord link: https://discord.gg/j5w2HR2d

reviews.review_description:
This VR tank game is really fun! The graphics are clean, and controlling a tank in VR adds to the immersion and makes it even more enjoyable. There is a short tutorial for beginners when starting the game, which allowed me to start playing immediately without any difficulties.

The game is comprised of several modes, and the best one was team deathmatch mode. It was very enjoyable to work together with teammates to take down the enemy. Additionally, each tank has unique skills and weapons, allowing for a variety of strategies depending on the tank selected.

However, there were some things that could have been better. I wished the game offered more diverse maps and tanks. Also, there was no option to change the language setting in-game, so people who don't use Korean had to play in English.

Overall, this game is really fun and immersive to play. If you're a fan of VR games, I recommend trying this one out!

developer_response.body:
Hello Linehat, 
Thank you for your generous review. Makes me happy to hear that you really like the game. Also, your feedback has been heard and will be delivered to the Dev team, so we can offer more diverse maps and tanks. Initially we had planned for 40 tanks, but I believe that will take some time. Also, we are offering 8 languages in total. You can find them in settings and change it to your preferred language. 
We have a great Discord community, so if you have any more feedbacks or questions, join us and talk to us. We're always listening to our players. 
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: This game delivers an exhilarating experience with its intense tank warfare and adrenaline-pumping FPS action. The 4v4 matches are filled with non-stop excitement, whether you're engaging in deathmatches or participating in occupation wars. The inclusion of tanks adds a thrilling dynamic, allowing for strategic maneuvers and tactical decision-making. The controls are smooth and responsive, ensuring a seamless gameplay experience. The game offers a variety of tank types to choose from, each with its own unique strengths and playstyle. The regular updates and active community create a vibrant gaming environment. If you're seeking a game that combines intense tank battles with thrilling FPS action, this game is a must-try!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your amazing review of our game! We are thrilled to hear that you found the experience exhilarating and filled with non-stop excitement. We aimed to create a dynamic and adrenaline-pumping experience, and we're delighted that you found it to be just that. Furthermore, we wanted to provide players with the opportunity to explore different strategies and find the tanks that best suit their play style, and we're glad you enjoyed this feature as well. 

Thank you for recommending our game to others who are seeking intense tank battles combined with thrilling FPS action. Your positive feedback encourages us to continue refining and enhancing the gaming experience for our players.

reviews.review_description:
Hi guys. I think the game play is unique compared to other games that are out.
I can see what they did with the cockpit thing to make it feel more realistic. At the same time, a level of toonish style to make it more friendly. 
Not bad over all. I’m more of a graphics guy so I wish it was more realistic but that doesn’t mean I’m complaining about the toon style it has. 
Everyone has their style so whatever works for you. I am struggling with the control and it will probably take some time to master, but the concept of the game is definitely worth my time.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ryan, thank you for your generous review! We're really happy to hear that enjoy our game and the uniqueness of what we've done. And I totally agree with you on the graphics. Some love it, while some hate it. I guess it boils down to preference.  
As for the control, practice makes perfect. Unless everyone is born ambidextrous, mastering the control takes time. We hope you get better with the control and possibly meet together in the battlefield. 
Also, if you haven't done so already, we have a Discord community where you can communicate with us and give us feedbacks and get all the updates. 
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_title: This game make me tank commander
reviews.review_description:
and Gunner,Driver,Loader.

 First of all, it can be a little awkward because I used a translator.
 
 As a person in a tank, this game requires you to constantly load ammo, maneuver the tank, and fire in order to win.
 
 Because this process takes place in battle, you can feel a lot of adrenaline.
 
 However, since the battle tempo is too fast, I wish all tanks were a bit harder.

developer_response.body:
Dear DoHyeonDo, thank you so much for going out of your way to even use a translator to leaving us a review! 
Yes, our game is quite fast-paced, and the adrenaline is definitely part of the game. We are also working on future updates that may change the dynamics of the game play, so if you'd like to keep up with all the latest news and future updates, please join our Discord community: https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: The concept and gameplay were good. It was good to understand what was considered to make the game. But graphics and Ai were disappointing. I look forward to future updates.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your 5-star review, even though there were some disappointments with the graphics and AI. We're constantly striving to make the game better, so we really appreciate your feedback and review. Join our Discord community and tell us all about your experience!
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr

reviews.review_description: Hallo admins I have a problem I'm alrady lvl 6 but I don't get the loot Box and any many to buy samthing for my tank I enjoy to play tank war but I can not .when I got lvl there writing I got the loot Box but when I go on this there is nothing PLS help my my id is :Asurraa#6566

developer_response.body:
Hello Asurraa, thank you for giving our game a chance. Glad to hear that you've reached level 6. The reason that it may feel like you didn't get any lootboxes are because the first loot boxes that were opened were automatic with the new tanks that you unlocked with each level. 
On a similar note, once you keep leveling, you'll notice that the lootboxes  will give you skins and deco before you start getting coins. But don't worry, after hitting certain level, you'll start getting coins eventually. 
If you have any questions, please join our Discord channel where you can interact with us directly and ask and learn about the game. 

https://discord.gg/P6RqfUBD

reviews.review_title: My first time writing a review!
reviews.review_description:
I don't usually leave reviews, but I hope this review helps someone and I think this game is worth buying.
I can tell you there is no perfect game, but you can create a fun teamwork experience with group matching.

I wish I could play with more people!

developer_response.body:
Hello Yuha118,
Thank you for writing your first review ever! I hope this review helps someone too. ☺️
And you're right, I have yet to see a perfect game and we are definitely far from being perfect. However, we will do our best to listen to all the feedbacks from our Commanders, and do our best to deliver a fun game that can be played with friends and family.

reviews.review_description: At the beginning I learned fast and it was super easy fantastic 👌

developer_response.body:
Hi Sherwin, 
So happy to hear your wonderful review! It always brings us joy and a smile when we read reviews such as yours. 
Hope you continue to enjoy the game and if you have any questions about the game, please join our Discord channel and say hello. 
We also have events where we compete against one another, so it can be so much more fun by playing with friends. 
https://discord.gg/hwFNR3Ec2D

reviews.review_description:
Graphics: good enough
Gameplay: Hard but fun
Replayability: Finding myself returning daily
Difficulty: Controls are hard to get used to.
Play pace: Very fast paced. Constantly in motion and you have to be aware of your surroundings
Price: Not everyone can afford but still affordable

developer_response.body:
Thank you hshenry03 for your review. We're really happy to hear that you're finding yourself returning to the game daily. We have some surprise updates coming soon so we hope you'll bring your friends too. And as for the affordability, we have game sales so if you want to know more about our events, news, sales info, come join our Discord channel so you don't miss out. 
https://discord.gg/tankarenavr
